tool_use.name: TodoWrite
tool_use.param: [{'content': 'Node 3.5: Rename build_original_plan_section → build_original_pr_section (4 ...[truncated 604 chars]...nd submit PR', 'status': 'completed', 'activeForm': 'Signaling GitHub and submitting PR'}]

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
## Branch Submission Complete
### What Was Done
- Staged all uncommitted changes (58 files) - Created commit with AI-generated message - Pushed branch to origin with upstream tracking - Found existing PR #9379 for this branch (skipped PR creation) - Added checkout footer and validated all PR checks pass
### Note
This is a draft PR. When ready for review, run: `gh pr ready`
### View PR
https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9379
